headlines.description: Olga Carmona sealed Women's World Cup glory for Spain in Sydney with a first-half goal that clinched a 1-0 victory against England.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spain edge England to win first World Cup title

headlines.description: Substitute Salma Paralluelo scored in extra time to lift Spain to a nervy 2-1 victory over the Netherlands on Friday and into the semi-finals of the Women's World Cup for the first time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spain beat Netherlands to reach 1st WWC semi

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Spain 1, England 0. Olga Carmona (Spain) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mariona Caldentey.
Substitution, England. Lauren James replaces Alessia Russo.
Substitution, England. Chloe Kelly replaces Rachel Daly.
Second Half begins Spain 1, England 0.
Lauren Hemp (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Spain. Oihane Hernández replaces Alba Redondo.
Penalty saved! Jenni Hermoso (Spain) fails to capitalise on this great opportunity,  left footed shot saved  in the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Spain. Ivana Andrés replaces Laia Codina because of an injury.
Salma Paralluelo (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, England. Bethany England replaces Ella Toone.
Substitution, Spain. Alexia Putellas replaces Mariona Caldentey.
Second Half ends, Spain 1, England 0.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Oihane Hernández (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Damaris Egurrola (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Netherlands. Lynn Wilms replaces Jill Roord.
Substitution, Spain. Salma Paralluelo replaces Alba Redondo.
Substitution, Spain. Ivana Andrés replaces Laia Codina because of an injury.
Goal!  Spain 1, Netherlands 0. Mariona Caldentey (Spain) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, Netherlands. Katja Snoeijs replaces Sherida Spitse.
Substitution, Spain. Irene Guerrero replaces Aitana Bonmatí.
Substitution, Netherlands. Aniek Nouwen replaces Esmee Brugts.
Goal!  Spain 1, Netherlands 1. Stefanie van der Gragt (Netherlands) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Victoria Pelova with a through ball.
Substitution, Spain. Olga Carmona replaces Oihane Hernández.
First Half Extra Time begins Spain 1, Netherlands 1.
Substitution, Netherlands. Caitlin Dijkstra replaces Damaris Egurrola because of an injury.
Substitution, Spain. Alexia Putellas replaces Mariona Caldentey.
Substitution, Spain. Eva Navarro replaces Esther González.
Substitution, Netherlands. Kerstin Casparij replaces Stefanie van der Gragt.
Goal!  Spain 2, Netherlands 1. Salma Paralluelo (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Jenni Hermoso.
